items.title: 科蒂提前终止古驰美妆业务特许经营协议，为业务重组筹集资金
items.summary: Coty agreed to return the Gucci beauty and fragrance license to Kering roughly a year early, for a deal valued near $400 million ($250M cash at signing, up to $150M more by Sept 2027). Coty will keep operating Gucci beauty through June 30, 2027, before L'Oreal takes over under its 50-year Kering licensing deal. Coty cited the need to raise funds for its own business restructuring.

items.title: 欧莱雅支付4亿美元“分手费”，提前一年获得古驰美妆授权
items.summary: Follow-up reporting on the Coty-Kering-L'Oreal Gucci beauty handover: L'Oreal covers about 70% of the $400M early-termination and inventory cost, with new L'Oreal-run Gucci beauty operations expected mid-2027 pending regulatory approval. Piece notes Gucci beauty represented 8% of Coty's total sales and 11% of its profit, a meaningful hit as Coty's 2025 operating profit already fell 88.85%. Frames the move as Kering consolidating luxury beauty control after its Oct 2025 L'Oreal mega-deal.

items.title: 「グッチ フローラ」が新フレグランス発売 香水着想の限定メイクアップコレクションも
items.summary: Gucci Beauty announces a new Flora fragrance, 'Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid Eau de Parfum Intense,' launching Sept 1, 2026, fronted by Miley Cyrus, with a limited eyeshadow palette and two lipstick shades sold alongside it. Prices run ¥5,170-¥24,970 depending on size. Standard activation-style beauty news out of Japan trade press.

items.title: 最強開運日に手に入れたい。「グッチ」の日本限定ウォレット＆レザーグッズ
items.summary: Gucci is releasing a Japan-exclusive GG Marmont wallet/leather-goods capsule and a Gucci Lettering line ahead of global release, timed to the July 19 'lucky day' (Tensha-bi/Ichiryu Manbaiki/Taian) with personalization engraving offered. Prices ¥89,100-¥97,900. Localized activation marketing tactic tailored to Japanese consumer superstition/gifting culture.

items.title: 张凌赫杂志造型|张凌赫|gucci|嘉人|紧身皮衣
items.summary: Chinese actor and Gucci brand ambassador Zhang Linghe's Vogue China July cover (Gucci Primavera styling, black fitted leather) drove strong fan engagement on Weibo. Vogue China's post on the cover reveal drew roughly 34,196 reposts and 11,916 comments; Gucci's own post on the same shoot drew about 31,646 reposts and 7,144 comments. Coverage frames Zhang as Gucci's only male-artist Vogue China exclusive in nearly a decade -- ambassador-driven fandom volume rather than organic brand sentiment.

items.title: 구찌 | StyleChosun
items.summary: Korean fashion-media summer styling feature pairs Gucci bags, floral dresses, sunglasses and a roughly 750,000-won Gucci floral-print fan for a resort-to-city look. Routine product-placement editorial, included for completeness though it sits near the 7-14 day freshness ceiling.

items.title: グッチ フローラ ゴージャス ガーデニア オードパルファム インテンスの口コミ一覧
items.summary: Ongoing Japanese consumer review thread on @cosme (a major J-beauty review community) for Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia Intense. Mixed reception: positive notes cite long-lasting scent and compliments received; negative notes say the gardenia note reads weaker than expected, overly sweet, and too strong/formal for office or school wear. Genuine unpaid consumer opinion, not brand-controlled.

items.title: 【試してみた】〔グッチ フローラ ゴージャス ジャスミン〕オードパルファム GUCCI beautyのリアルな口コミ・レビュー
items.summary: Community review posts on LIPS (Japanese beauty UGC platform) for Gucci Flora Gorgeous Jasmine describe it as a fresh, low-fatigue floral scent well suited to summer with better-than-expected longevity. Skews positive but is granular product-level chatter rather than brand-wide sentiment; useful as community-channel signal distinct from official PR.
